findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name web_fileresponse analysis
 * @description Analyze the web_fileresponse.py file for file serving logic
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity note
 * @id py/web-fileresponse-analysis
 * @tags security

import python

from File f
where f.getRelativePath() = "aiohttp/web_fileresponse.py"
select f, "web_fileresponse.py file found"
findings.hypothesis: Analyze the web_fileresponse.py file structure to understand file serving logic
